instance ResolutionOfIdentity.instFunLike [MeasurableSpace őĪ] : FunLike (ResolutionOfIdentity őĪ H)
    (Set őĪ) (H ‚ÜíL[‚Ąā] H) where
  coe E := E.measureOf'
  coe_injective' | ‚ü®_, _, _, _,  _, _, _‚ü©, ‚ü®_, _, _, _, _, _, _‚ü©, rfl => rfl

def toComplexMeasure {őĪ : Type*} [MeasurableSpace őĪ] (E : ResolutionOfIdentity őĪ H) (x y : H) : ComplexMeasure őĪ where
  measureOf' w := ‚ü™x, E.measureOf' w y‚üę_‚Ąā
  empty' := by
    rw [E.empty']
    simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.zero_apply, inner_zero_right]
  not_measurable' w h := by
    rw [E.not_measurable' h]
    simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.zero_apply, inner_zero_right]
  m_iUnion' := E.m_iUnion'

def toOuterMeasure {őĪ : Type*} [MeasurableSpace őĪ] (E : ResolutionOfIdentity őĪ H) (x : H) : OuterMeasure őĪ where

variable (őĪ : Type*) [MeasurableSpace őĪ]

variable {H: Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup H] [InnerProductSpace ‚Ąā H] [CompleteSpace H]

def IsOrthogonalProjection (p : H ‚ÜíL[‚Ąā] H) : Prop := p = p ^ 2 ‚ąß p = p.adjoint

lemma IsStarProjection_iff (p : H ‚ÜíL[‚Ąā] H) : IsStarProjection p ‚ÜĒ ‚ąÉ (K : Submodule ‚Ąā H),
    ‚ąÉ (kH : K.HasOrthogonalProjection), p = K.subtypeL.comp (@K.orthogonalProjection _ _ _ _ _ kH)

-- the subspace corresponding to the orthogonal projection
noncomputable def toSubmodule (p : H ‚ÜíL[‚Ąā] H) (hp : IsStarProjection p) :
  Submodule ‚Ąā H := Classical.choose ((IsStarProjection_iff p).mp hp)

-- the projection as `orthogonalProjection`
